headline: Here is Why Vistra (VST) is Among the Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in 2026
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is included among the 13 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in 2026. Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the largest competitive power generators in the United States. headline: Seaport Research Raises its Price Target on Vistra Corp. (VST)
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the 12 High Quality Stocks to Buy for the Long Term. On June 15, 2026, Seaport Research raised the firm’s price target on Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) to $230 from $227 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. A day later, Bernstein analyst Sunaina Ocalan initiated coverage of Vistra […]
